titleStmt.title: SII 19.214: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 214. (A.R. No. 176 of 1929.) GŌVINDAPUTTŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, GAṄGĀJAṬĀDHARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is evidently an inscription of Vikrama-Chōḷa as it refers to a channel called after his father Kulōttuṅga. It records an exemption from the taxes kuḍimai, śilvari, etc. on 121 (vēli) and odd of the dēvadāna village Vēḻūr belonging to the temple of Vijayamaṅgalam-uḍaiya-Mahādēvar, granted by the assembly (perunguri-perumakkaḷ) of Parāntaka-Chaturvēdimaṅgalam, on receipt of 230 kaḻañju of gold from the temple. It also records an extra gift of 1600 kuḻi of tax-free land to the same temple for growing kuvaḷai (lotus) flowers for worship to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu śrīparān=takaccaru
ppetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Uṭaiyār śrī
vijayamaṅkalamuṭaiya mahādevar devatāṉam veḷur nilam nūṟṟoru
pattoṉṟe ciṉṉattukku kuṭimaikaḷum nirāruḷḷiṭṭa cilvarikaḷum tavin
ta kuṭuttu Ikoyil paṇṭārattu koṇṭa cevvai kācu
niṟai poṉ Irunūṟṟu muppatiṉ kaḻaiñcu kaikkoṇṭom
peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom śrī vijayamaṅkaiyuṭaiya mahādevaṟkku Ārātaṉaikku kuvaḷai Iṭa viṭṭa Iṟai
ili nilamāvatu kaṇavativatikku meṟkku kulottuṅkacoḻavāykkāllukku vaṭakku Ivvati vāykkāliraṇṭum maṉai
kkuḷamuṅ karaiyum paṉniraṭikkolāl kuḻi 1000 6 100- ṉāl nilam mukkāle ciṉ namum Iṟaiyiliyāka kuvaḷaiyiṭa viṭṭo
m peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom .
Digital edition of SII 19.214 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
